creator: ilya@martynov.org
text:
wget --passive-ftp causes coredump

Fix: Not a fix but workaround. Apply this patch to ports/ftp/Makefile:
How-To-Repeat: wget --passive-ftp ftp://ftp.yggdrasil.com/mirrors/site/ftp.gnome.org/pub/GNOME/stable/sources/libxml/libxml2-2.3.8.tar.gz
--15:34:50--
ftp://ftp.yggdrasil.com/mirrors/site/ftp.gnome.org/pub/GNOME/stable/sources/libxml/libxml2-2.3.8.tar.gz
           => libxml2-2.3.8.tar.gz'
천횙횚횁횓횕횞횏횁 횙횕횇횆횋횓횇횓횋횗 횙 ftp.yggdrasil.com:21... 횙횕횇횆횋횓횋횑횋횙횠!
챵횇횉횋횙횚횘횁횄횋횗 횖횕횆 횋횒횇횓횇횒 anonymous ... 챵횇횉횋횙횚횘횁횄횋횗 횖횘횕횤횑횁 횛횙횖횇횤횓횕!
==> TYPE I ... 횙횆횇횑횁횓횕.  ==> CWD mirrors/site/ftp.gnome.org/pub/GNOME/stable/sources/libxml ... 횙횆횇횑횁횓횕.
==> EPSV ... Abort trap (core dumped)
